description_long: This is a stone grave monument featuring a prominent bust of a bearded man mounted on a pedestal at the head of the grave. The grave is constructed from weathered gray stone, with moss and lichen growth visible along the base and edges, indicating age and exposure to the elements. The bust appears to be made of oxidized bronze or copper, giving it a greenish patina. On the grave slab, there are two sculpted floral wreaths and a ring, likely made of metal or stone, placed as memorial offerings. The front face of the grave bears an inscription, 'FAMILLE D. BLOCH,' engraved into the stone. The overall structure is rectangular, with a tiered base and a slightly sloped top surface.
description: A weathered stone grave monument with a bronze bust, floral wreaths, and an engraved family name on the front.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the tiered stone base, with moss along the edges.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust, the sloped grave slab, and visible floral wreaths.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the bust, two floral wreaths, a ring, and the engraved inscription 'FAMILLE D. BLOCH.'
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bust's profile, the grave slab, and the arrangement of memorial offerings.
